title: Company Names Tribunal decision: ENI Chemicals Italy Ltd
body: "Application number 5437  Applicant ENI S.P.A objected to the name used by ENI Chemicals Italy Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 21 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of ENI Chemicals Italy Ltd is changed to 16146680 Ltd. "
